title: PubId::Display shows truncated form, making full identity unloggable via tracing
description: identity.rs PubId Display impl delegates to short() (first 8 chars + ellipsis). Any tracing::info!(pub_id=%pub_id) call logs only the truncated form. Debugging auth failures or relay logs requires reconstructing which identity is involved from 8 chars. Consider making Display emit the full 64-char hex and providing short() only for UI-facing display. The current design makes structured logs ambiguous when two pub_ids share a prefix.
